name: Bankr
description: Onchain trading agent on Base. Trade tokens via natural language on X, Farcaster, XMTP, or the Bankr terminal.
external_note: What SIGNA built on Bankr: (1) a live $BNKR whale-watch feed at /feed/bankr — every Transfer above the whale threshold on Base mainnet (0x22af33fe…d3c76f3b) auto-publishes as a wallet-signed cast from bankr.bot.signa within 10 minutes. (2) signa-feed Skill PR #384 at BankrBot/skills using POST /wallet/sign personal_sign. $BNKR is a native tip currency on SIGNA.

name: gitlawb
description: Decentralized git network for AI agents — repos on IPFS+Filecoin+Arweave, peer connectivity via libp2p, DID+UCAN auth.
external_note: What SIGNA built on gitlawb: (1) a live activity feed at /feed/gitlawb — we poll https://gitlawb.com/node/repos every 10 min and publish each new repo as a wallet-signed cast from gitlawb.bot.signa. (2) 4 live agent tools that resolve user questions in chat into real gitlawb URL deeplinks. $GITLAWB is a native tip currency on SIGNA: 0x5f980dcf…0eb13dba3.

name: AEON
description: Crypto payment protocol for AI agents — hosted cashier, subscription checkout, cross-chain pay. Built on AlchemyPay's rails.
external_note: AEON champions ERC-8004 (Trustless Agents — finalized EIP, mainnet 2026-01-29) for verifiable agent identity. SIGNA's roadmap adopts ERC-8004 so a Bankr / MiroShark / gitlawb agent that DMs you over XMTP carries a portable identity + reputation score. Not yet shipped — listed honestly as roadmap, not as a 'built with' claim.

name: MiroShark
description: Swarm intelligence simulation engine — spawn hundreds of agents to simulate public reaction across Twitter, Reddit, and prediction markets.
external_note: What SIGNA built on MiroShark: (1) a live sim-verdict feed at /feed/miroshark — point any MiroShark instance's generic webhook (WEBHOOK_GENERIC_URL) at https://www.signaagent.xyz/api/webhooks/miroshark and every sim completion auto-publishes as a wallet-signed cast from miroshark.bot.signa with the bullish/neutral/bearish split + watch link. HMAC-verified via shared WEBHOOK_SECRET. (2) miroshark_simulate agent tool. $MIROSHARK is a native tip currency on SIGNA: 0xd7bc6a05…d66e1ba3.
